name: yarradev
description: yarradev board orchestrator: a reconciliation-loop that drives a yarradev HTTP board (Cloudflare Durable Object) and dispatches role subagents (designer/developer/tester/security-advisor/code-reviewer/devops/releaser) through a gated lifecycle (backlog→spec→dev→test→done→staging→prod) as detached `claude -p` processes via the headless `yarradev run` daemon (or Agent-tool subagents in the legacy in-session mode) — running on your own Claude subscription.
